description_long: This pastry shop features a rectangular, single-story structure with a flat, dark roof and a light gray facade. The front entrance is adorned with a double glass door, flanked by two large circular windows and a small awning above, giving it a welcoming appearance. A small outdoor area with a bench and a trash bin is present to the left of the entrance, while the right side is bordered by a short fence. The side and rear walls are plain, with minimal windows and a single service door on one side. The building sits on a stone-tiled base, which extends around the perimeter, providing a clean and defined boundary. Subtle decorative elements, such as the flag and signage above the entrance, add character to the shop.
description: A modern, single-story pastry shop with a flat roof, glass double doors, circular windows, and a stone-tiled base, featuring minimalistic yet inviting exterior details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with double glass doors, two circular windows, a small awning, a bench, and a trash bin.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain wall with a single service door and a flag near the front corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a simple back wall with minimal detailing and a small fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a long, unadorned wall with a small window and a fenced section near the front.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular sign is mounted above the entrance, featuring a logo and text, with a color scheme that includes red, white, and blue. The signage is centered and proportionate to the facade, with a decorative flag to the left side, enhancing visibility and appeal.
attribute_outdoor_seating: A single bench is present to the left of the entrance, providing limited outdoor seating. No tables or additional chairs are visible.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, flat roof, and clean lines, featuring functional elements and a straightforward facade.
